mapper.select: select (case job when 1 then '班主任' when 2 then '讲师' when 3 then '学工主管' when 4 then '教研主管' when 5 then '咨询师' else '其他' end) pos, count(*) num from emp group by pos order by num;
select if(gender = 1, '男', '女') as name, count(*) as value from emp group by gender;
select c.name className, count(*) num from clazz c left join student s on c.id = s.clazz_id group by c.name order by num;
select case degree when 1 then '初中' when 2 then '高中' when 3 then '大专' when 4 then '本科' when 5 then '硕士' when 6 then '博士' else '其他'end name, count(*) value from student group by degree
